text.title: Templates index
text.summary: Index of templates rendered during phase 3 (scaffold). Templates live in the workflow's templates/ folder, organised by category.

list.item: sdk.py.j2 — Claude Agent SDK wrapper with structured_query and agent_query presets.
config.py.j2 — configuration constants and env-var loading.
cli.py.j2 — CLI entry point dispatching modes.
stages/*.py.j2 — one per stage (s0_editorial_plan, s1_collect, s2_research, s3_generate, s4_review, s5_revise, s6_tg_post, s7_save, s7_deploy, s8_verify, s10_pick_publish, s11_digest).

section.title: Prompts (templates/prompts/)
section.p: Jinja2 templates rendering the system / ===SPLIT=== / task envelope.

section.title: Schemas (templates/schemas/)
section.p: JSON schemas validating structured_query output per stage.

list.item: editorial_plan.json — plan output (array of topic objects).
generation.json — article output (title, slug, body, summary).
tg_post.json — caption text plus image hint.
digest.json — digest body and item list.

section.title: Site (templates/gatsby/)
section.p: Gatsby 5 starter with markdown content pipeline.

list.item: gatsby-config.js.j2 — config with markdown and image plugins.
deploy.sh.j2 — SSH deploy script (push, pull on server, build, rsync to webroot).

section.title: Admin (templates/admin/)
section.p: Optional Flask admin panel for review-mode outlets.

list.item: app.py.j2 — Flask admin panel with login, queue view, approve and reject actions.

section.title: Scripts (templates/scripts/)
section.p: Shell entry points used by media-manager cron jobs and manual operators.

list.item: run-pipeline.sh.j2 — cron entry point activating venv and dispatching modes.
send_post.py.j2 — Telegram sender used by publish mode.
manage_state.py.j2 — state file inspector and reset utility.
